Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jul-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-93-260733 Estate of George A. Melnikoff;
PES-18-302251 Estate of Vera M. Semenoff; PES-19-302252 Estate of Nadia A. Wilson;
PES-19-302253 Estate of Peter Semenoff; PES-19-302254 Estate of Nancy A. Jordon;
PES-19-302255 Estate of Robert Jordon; PES-19-302256 Estate of Ronald Melnikoff;
PES-18-302258 Estate of Mary A. Melnikoff and PES-19-302535 Estate of George A. Melnikoff, Jr.

Appearances: Lisa Tandoc for Nicholas Melnikoff.

Ms. Tandoc stated that there is no direct probate code regarding a post deceased heir with respect to succession, that all of the estates are under $150,000.00, and that all of the inventory and appraisals have been performed. Ms. Tandoc also spoke of a similar case in Alameda County, stated that she feels they can do something similar, made reference to Probate Code 13151, and stated that all of the named heirs are in agreement and have consented. All Petitions to Determine Succession to Real Property (9) are under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
